svg.title: vibe-manager mode comparison — Quick vs Standard vs Full
svg.desc: Three modes side by side. Quick is for small experiments, produces 1 file in about 10 minutes. Standard is for MVPs, produces 2 to 3 files in about 20 minutes. Full is for production products, produces 6 files plus full agent architecture in about 40 minutes. The table shows how each mode handles five key behaviors: web research, architecture spec, design spec, agent plan, and final output count.
